title: Pastel Pink Glass Vase-7 Inch Elegant Colored Vases for Flowers, Bouquet, Unique Bubble Flower Vases for Centerpiece, Wedding Table, Desk, Decorative Vase for Home Decor, Living Room, Office
features: 𝐏𝐞𝐫𝐟𝐞𝐜𝐭 𝐒𝐢𝐳𝐞: Pink glass vase, measuring 7 inches tall, 3.5 inches diameter, portable weight make it fits seamlessly on dining tables, shelves, countertops, mantels, nightstands, the pink vase perfectly adds a splash of color to your living room, dining areas, kitchen, entryway, office

𝐒𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐝𝐲 𝐆𝐥𝐚𝐬𝐬 𝐕𝐚𝐬𝐞: Crafted from durable glass, high quality craftsmanship, chip-resistant. Sleek three-layer sculptural design, glossy finish. Weighted base and rounded edges ensure stability, watertight, making this glass vase an ideal choice for holding fresh flowers and plants

𝐌𝐮𝐥𝐭𝐢-𝐅𝐮𝐧𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐚𝐥 𝐔𝐬𝐞: This pink vase is a perfect choice for any home décor and occasion, not only for displaying fresh flowers, lego flowers, artificial plants, can be used as a standalone piece of décor, also frequently be used for wedding decor, parties, thanksgiving table setting, Christmas decoration and more

𝐓𝐡𝐨𝐮𝐠𝐡𝐭𝐟𝐮𝐥 𝐆𝐢𝐟𝐭: Our glass vase was wrapped with impact-resistant package against drops, vibrations, and rough handling during transit, ensure arrives with good condition, ready to impress as a wedding gift, housewarming gift, Mother's Day gift, birthday, anniversary present and more

𝐄𝐚𝐬𝐲 𝐭𝐨 𝐂𝐥𝐞𝐚𝐧: Our glass vase is easy to clean, low maintenance, simply wipe with a soft cloth or hand-wash for quick upkeep. No complicated maintenance needed, focus on styling instead of stressing over care. Avoid using abrasive cleaners or harsh chemicals

𝐇𝐞𝐥𝐩𝐟𝐮𝐥 𝐓𝐢𝐩𝐬: If your vase arrived damaged, please contact us for a replacement or refund. This vase Not Comes With flowers or any other accessories, it's just for display. Our vases are handmade productions, with each piece varying uniquely in color and size. Small air bubbles, black spots, and uneven material powder distribution are natural, unrepeatable details that enhance their one-of-a-kind handmade charm
